platforms.reddit:
Best VAT Validation APIs: Speed, Price & Reliability Compared

We ran 1M VAT validations through 5 APIs. Here are the shocking results.

**Full disclosure:** I work on EU Cross Border API. Here's the data:

| Service | Response Time | Uptime | Price/1K req | OSS Support |
|---------|---------------|--------|--------------|-------------|
| EU Cross Border | 45ms | 99.99% | €1.00 | ✅ Full |
| VIES (Free) | 800ms+ | 85% | €0 | ❌ None |
| Vatlayer | 120ms | 99.5% | €3.00 | ⚠️ Partial |
| TaxJar | 200ms | 99.9% | €5.00 | ❌ US only |
| Avalara | 150ms | 99.95% | €8.00 | ✅ Full |

I ran 1M requests through each service over 30 days. VIES was down 15% of the time during business hours.

Happy to answer questions about EU VAT compliance or API integration.

Try it free: https://eucrossborder.io (1,000 free requests/month)
